reforms.description: The French government implemented measures to encourage the creation and expansion of small and medium-sized enterprises, including tax reductions for investors in small businesses and improved legal treatment for self-employed individuals.
reforms.component_name: Tax and Legal Support for SMEs
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: These measures are designed to stimulate entrepreneurship and business growth, which can enhance economic productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The measures have been put into effect and are actively supporting small enterprises.
reforms.importance_rationale: While significant, these reforms are not structural changes but rather enhancements to existing support mechanisms.
reforms.source_quote: The main items in this package include equality of legal treatment between small businesses and companies, the simplification of administrative procedures and improved access to local saving via, for example, tax reductions for people investing in small businesses.

reforms.description: The French government has initiated significant reforms in the transport sector, including the regrouping of major motorway companies and the development of the TGV network, which has improved rail services and passenger traffic.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: These infrastructure improvements enhance connectivity and efficiency, contributing to economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The reforms have been executed and are operational, enhancing transport services.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a major overhaul of the transport infrastructure, impacting multiple sectors.
reforms.source_quote: The introduction of high-speed trains demonstrates the capacity of rail companies to innovate and has improved the quality of rail services by cutting travelling times considerably.
